sections.paragraph:
συστροφή, ῆς, ἡ [συστρέφω]

—1. gathering

—a. w. context indicating a component of seditious aspect Ac 19:40.

—b. with context indicating a component of nefarious intent Ac 23:12. But

—2. plot/conspiracy may be meant in Ac 23:12, in which case focus is on the dominant topic of a gathered group, for a plot presumes a group of formulators.
